news.title: Torrent Pharma receives USFDA zero-observation nod for oncology facility.

news.title:
ICICI Securities forecasts tepid Q4 FY26 pharma sector revenue growth of 7.2% YoY with EBITDA, PAT declining.
Top picks: Sun Pharma, Aurobindo, Alkem, Gland; Torrent, Alkem to gain from domestic focus, Lupin shows resilience.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities forecasts tepid Q4 FY26 pharma sector revenue growth of 7.2% YoY with EBITDA, PAT declining.
Top picks: Sun Pharma, Aurobindo, Alkem, Gland; Torrent, Alkem to gain from domestic focus, Lupin shows resilience.

news.title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals' oncology facility at Bileshwarpura cleared US FDA inspection with zero observations.
news.summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals' oncology facility at Bileshwarpura cleared US FDA inspection with zero observations.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance approved ₹30/share interim dividend; M&M reported higher March '26 production/sales led by utility vehicles.
Lupin launched dapagliflozin in the US; Torrent Pharma's Gujarat oncology unit was inspected by USFDA from April 6-10, '26.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance approved ₹30/share interim dividend; M&M reported higher March '26 production/sales led by utility vehicles.
Lupin launched dapagliflozin in the US; Torrent Pharma's Gujarat oncology unit was inspected by USFDA from April 6-10, '26.

news.title:
Indian pharma grew 8.8% in FY26 to Rs 2.46 lakh crore, led by cardiac (13.6%) and anti-diabetic (11.3%) segments.
Top players Sun Pharma, Abbott, Cipla, Mankind, Torrent Pharma saw double-digit growth; Eli Lilly's Mounjaro led drug sales.
news.summary:
Indian pharma grew 8.8% in FY26 to Rs 2.46 lakh crore, led by cardiac (13.6%) and anti-diabetic (11.3%) segments.
Top players Sun Pharma, Abbott, Cipla, Mankind, Torrent Pharma saw double-digit growth; Eli Lilly's Mounjaro led drug sales.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma's Gujarat oncology plant inspection by USFDA ended with zero observations.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 26.3% to ₹635 Cr; India revenues grew 14% to ₹1,798 Cr.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma's Gujarat oncology plant inspection by USFDA ended with zero observations.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 26.3% to ₹635 Cr; India revenues grew 14% to ₹1,798 Cr.

news.title:
USFDA inspected Torrent Pharma's Bileshwarpura oncology facility from April 6-10, 2026.
Inspection concluded with zero observations, reflecting compliance and product quality confidence.
news.summary:
USFDA inspected Torrent Pharma's Bileshwarpura oncology facility from April 6-10, 2026.
Inspection concluded with zero observations, reflecting compliance and product quality confidence.

news.title:
Lupin, Sun Pharma, Torrent Pharma, CCL Products, and Karnataka Bank show resilience amid market volatility, bucking broader sell-off trends.
Strong fundamentals like steady growth, robust pipelines, and strategic moves drive their performance; suitability for long-term leadership remains key.
news.summary:
Lupin, Sun Pharma, Torrent Pharma, CCL Products, and Karnataka Bank show resilience amid market volatility, bucking broader sell-off trends.
Strong fundamentals like steady growth, robust pipelines, and strategic moves drive their performance; suitability for long-term leadership remains key.

news.title:
Sun Pharma and Torrent Pharma are the only large-cap stocks with a perfect Piotroski score of 9, highlighting their strong financial health.
Sun Pharma excels in R&D and global presence, while Torrent Pharma leads in Indian and Brazilian markets, with robust growth and acquisitions driving performance.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma and Torrent Pharma are the only large-cap stocks with a perfect Piotroski score of 9, highlighting their strong financial health.
Sun Pharma excels in R&D and global presence, while Torrent Pharma leads in Indian and Brazilian markets, with robust growth and acquisitions driving performance.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma sold 50,000 shares of UNM Foundation for ₹5L.
Buyer is Torrent Investments, a promoter; transaction is arm's length.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma sold 50,000 shares of UNM Foundation for ₹5L.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley initiates coverage on Torrent Pharma with Equal Weight rating.

news.summary:

news.title:
Tribunal issued corrigendum for J.B. Chemicals' merger with Torrent Pharma.
Corrigendum order uploaded on Tribunal's website after earlier intimation.
news.summary:

The order pertains to the first motion application for the amalgamation scheme.

news.title:
ICICI Securities highlights disruption in India's Rs 1.6B GLP-1 market with generics entering, priced 50-90% lower than innovators.
Torrent Pharma leads as the only listed Indian firm announcing oral semaglutide plans, with generics boosting access and competition.
news.summary:

Torrent Pharma leads as the only listed Indian firm announcing oral semaglutide plans, with generics boosting access and competition.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma launches oral and injectable Semaglutide in India, targeting type 2 diabetes and obesity.
Injectable Semaglutide priced at Rs. 3,999/month; first Indian firm with generic oral Semaglutide.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma launches oral and injectable Semaglutide in India, targeting type 2 diabetes and obesity.
Injectable Semaglutide priced at Rs. 3,999/month; first Indian firm with generic oral Semaglutide.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Torrent Pharma, targeting Rs 5,100, citing JB acquisition synergies, double-digit India growth, and US business scaling $200m+.
EBITDA margins to expand; net debt turning to net cash by FY30 despite possible soft Q4FY26.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Torrent Pharma, targeting Rs 5,100, citing JB acquisition synergies, double-digit India growth, and US business scaling $200m+.
EBITDA margins to expand; net debt turning to net cash by FY30 despite possible soft Q4FY26.
